mapper.sql: catalog_id, resource_id, resource_name, resource_type, org_name, description, tags, category_path, access_type, data_format, field_count, record_count, last_updated, status
mapper.update: UPDATE td_catalog_item SET resource_name = #{resourceName}, resource_type = #{resourceType}, org_name = #{orgName}, description = #{description}, tags = #{tags}, category_path = #{categoryPath}, access_type = #{accessType}, data_format = #{dataFormat}, field_count = #{fieldCount}, record_count = #{recordCount}, last_updated = NOW(), status = #{status} WHERE catalog_id = #{catalogId}
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT c.* FROM td_catalog_item c INNER JOIN td_data_field f ON c.resource_id = f.resource_id WHERE f.field_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{fieldName}, '%') OR f.field_alias LIKE CONCAT('%', #{fieldName}, '%') OR f.description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{fieldName}, '%') ORDER BY c.last_updated DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT c.catalog_id) FROM td_catalog_item c INNER JOIN td_data_field f ON c.resource_id = f.resource_id WHERE f.field_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{fieldName}, '%') OR f.field_alias LIKE CONCAT('%', #{fieldName}, '%') OR f.description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{fieldName}, '%')
